name: Telegram Sticker Search
description: Minimal Telegram sticker semantic search for OpenClaw using Gemini Embedding 2 and local SQLite/in-memory vector search

embeddingApiKey.description: Gemini API key used for embedding calls

embeddingModel.description: Gemini embedding model used for sticker and query embeddings

autoCollect.description: Whether to automatically queue newly seen Telegram sticker sets from incoming sticker traffic
